testcase.name: Login API Integration Tests Successful Login Scenarios should successfully login with valid credentials
testcase.classname: should successfully login with valid credentials

testcase.name: Login API Integration Tests Successful Login Scenarios should return username in response on successful login
testcase.classname: should return username in response on successful login

testcase.name: Login API Integration Tests Invalid Credentials Handling should reject login with wrong password
testcase.classname: should reject login with wrong password

testcase.name: Login API Integration Tests Invalid Credentials Handling should reject login with non-existing user
testcase.classname: should reject login with non-existing user

testcase.name: Login API Integration Tests Empty/Missing Field Handling should reject login with empty email
testcase.classname: should reject login with empty email

testcase.name: Login API Integration Tests Empty/Missing Field Handling should reject login with empty password
testcase.classname: should reject login with empty password

testcase.name: Login API Integration Tests Empty/Missing Field Handling should reject login with missing email field
testcase.classname: should reject login with missing email field

testcase.name: Login API Integration Tests Empty/Missing Field Handling should reject login with missing password field
testcase.classname: should reject login with missing password field

testcase.name: Login API Integration Tests Empty/Missing Field Handling should reject login with both fields empty
testcase.classname: should reject login with both fields empty

testcase.name: Login API Integration Tests Invalid Email Format Handling should reject login with invalid email format: no @
testcase.classname: should reject login with invalid email format: no @

testcase.name: Login API Integration Tests Invalid Email Format Handling should reject login with email missing domain
testcase.classname: should reject login with email missing domain

testcase.name: Login API Integration Tests Invalid Email Format Handling should reject login with email missing local part
testcase.classname: should reject login with email missing local part

testcase.name: Login API Integration Tests Password Length Validation should reject password shorter than 6 characters
testcase.classname: should reject password shorter than 6 characters

testcase.name: Login API Integration Tests Password Length Validation should accept exactly 6 character password
testcase.classname: should accept exactly 6 character password

testcase.name: Login API Integration Tests Response Structure should return correct response structure on success
testcase.classname: should return correct response structure on success

testcase.name: Login API Integration Tests Response Structure should return correct response structure on error
testcase.classname: should return correct response structure on error

testcase.name: Signup API Integration Tests Successful Signup Scenarios should successfully register with valid credentials
testcase.classname: should successfully register with valid credentials

testcase.name: Signup API Integration Tests Successful Signup Scenarios should register user with different valid email domains
testcase.classname: should register user with different valid email domains

testcase.name: Signup API Integration Tests Successful Signup Scenarios should accept exactly minimum username length (3 chars)
testcase.classname: should accept exactly minimum username length (3 chars)

testcase.name: Signup API Integration Tests Successful Signup Scenarios should accept exactly minimum password length (6 chars)
testcase.classname: should accept exactly minimum password length (6 chars)

testcase.classname: should reject signup with missing username

testcase.classname: should reject signup with missing email

testcase.classname: should reject signup with missing password

testcase.classname: should reject signup with missing confirmPassword

testcase.classname: should reject signup with all empty fields

testcase.classname: should reject username shorter than 3 characters

testcase.classname: should reject single character username

testcase.classname: should reject invalid email format: no @

testcase.classname: should reject email without domain

testcase.classname: should reject password shorter than 6 characters

testcase.classname: should reject 5 character password (boundary)

testcase.classname: should reject signup when passwords do not match

testcase.name: Signup API Integration Tests Password Mismatch Handling should reject when confirm password is empty but password is not
testcase.classname: should reject when confirm password is empty but password is not

testcase.name: Signup API Integration Tests Duplicate User Prevention should reject signup with existing email
testcase.classname: should reject signup with existing email

testcase.name: Signup API Integration Tests Duplicate User Prevention should allow same username with different email
testcase.classname: should allow same username with different email

testcase.name: Signup API Integration Tests Response Structure should return correct response structure on success
testcase.classname: should return correct response structure on success

testcase.classname: should return correct response structure on error

testcase.name: Signup API Integration Tests Advanced Interaction Scenarios should handle rapid multiple signup attempts
testcase.classname: should handle rapid multiple signup attempts

testcase.name: Signup API Integration Tests Advanced Interaction Scenarios should handle special characters in input
testcase.classname: should handle special characters in input

testcase.name: Edge Cases and Boundary Testing Special Characters in Email should accept email with dots: first.last@example.com
testcase.classname: should accept email with dots: first.last@example.com

testcase.name: Edge Cases and Boundary Testing Special Characters in Email should accept email with special chars that pass regex check
testcase.classname: should accept email with special chars that pass regex check

testcase.name: Edge Cases and Boundary Testing Special Characters in Email should accept email with hyphen in domain
testcase.classname: should accept email with hyphen in domain

testcase.name: Edge Cases and Boundary Testing Special Characters in Password should accept password with symbols: Pass@word123
testcase.classname: should accept password with symbols: Pass@word123

testcase.name: Edge Cases and Boundary Testing Special Characters in Password should accept password with hash: Pass#123456
testcase.classname: should accept password with hash: Pass#123456

testcase.name: Edge Cases and Boundary Testing Special Characters in Password should accept password with mixed special chars: P@ss!w#rd
testcase.classname: should accept password with mixed special chars: P@ss!w#rd

testcase.name: Edge Cases and Boundary Testing Special Characters in Username should accept username with underscore: test_user
testcase.classname: should accept username with underscore: test_user

testcase.name: Edge Cases and Boundary Testing Special Characters in Username should accept username with numbers: user123
testcase.classname: should accept username with numbers: user123

testcase.name: Edge Cases and Boundary Testing Special Characters in Username should accept username with hyphen: test-user
testcase.classname: should accept username with hyphen: test-user

testcase.name: Edge Cases and Boundary Testing Boundary Value Testing should accept username at minimum boundary: exactly 3 chars
testcase.classname: should accept username at minimum boundary: exactly 3 chars

testcase.name: Edge Cases and Boundary Testing Boundary Value Testing should reject username below minimum boundary: 2 chars
testcase.classname: should reject username below minimum boundary: 2 chars

testcase.name: Edge Cases and Boundary Testing Boundary Value Testing should accept password at minimum boundary: exactly 6 chars
testcase.classname: should accept password at minimum boundary: exactly 6 chars

testcase.name: Edge Cases and Boundary Testing Boundary Value Testing should reject password below minimum boundary: 5 chars
testcase.classname: should reject password below minimum boundary: 5 chars

testcase.name: Edge Cases and Boundary Testing Boundary Value Testing should accept very long username: 50+ characters
testcase.classname: should accept very long username: 50+ characters

testcase.name: Edge Cases and Boundary Testing Boundary Value Testing should accept very long password: 100+ characters
testcase.classname: should accept very long password: 100+ characters

testcase.name: Edge Cases and Boundary Testing Boundary Value Testing should accept very long email: valid format with length
testcase.classname: should accept very long email: valid format with length

testcase.name: Edge Cases and Boundary Testing Security Testing - SQL Injection Prevention should accept email-like text even with SQL chars (app should sanitize)
testcase.classname: should accept email-like text even with SQL chars (app should sanitize)

testcase.name: Edge Cases and Boundary Testing Security Testing - SQL Injection Prevention should handle SQL injection attempt in password
testcase.classname: should handle SQL injection attempt in password

testcase.classname: should handle SQL injection attempt in username

testcase.classname: should reject email with leading space

testcase.name: Edge Cases and Boundary Testing Whitespace and Formatting should reject email with trailing space
testcase.classname: should reject email with trailing space

testcase.name: Edge Cases and Boundary Testing Whitespace and Formatting should reject email with internal space
testcase.classname: should reject email with internal space

testcase.name: Edge Cases and Boundary Testing Whitespace and Formatting should reject password with only spaces
testcase.classname: should reject password with only spaces

testcase.name: Edge Cases and Boundary Testing Whitespace and Formatting should accept username with no spaces: valid
testcase.classname: should accept username with no spaces: valid

testcase.name: Edge Cases and Boundary Testing Case Sensitivity should accept email with uppercase letters
testcase.classname: should accept email with uppercase letters

testcase.classname: should accept password with mixed case

testcase.name: Edge Cases and Boundary Testing Case Sensitivity should accept username with uppercase
testcase.classname: should accept username with uppercase

testcase.classname: should accept numeric password: 123456

testcase.classname: should accept numeric username if >= 3 chars: 123

testcase.classname: should reject numeric email: 12345 (no domain)

testcase.name: Edge Cases and Boundary Testing Numeric Only Input should reject numeric email without @: 123@456
testcase.classname: should reject numeric email without @: 123@456

testcase.classname: should accept email with numbers and hyphens in domain

testcase.name: Edge Cases and Boundary Testing Unicode and International Characters should handle username with international chars
testcase.classname: should handle username with international chars

testcase.name: Edge Cases and Boundary Testing Null and Undefined Edge Cases should handle null as email
testcase.classname: should handle null as email

testcase.name: Edge Cases and Boundary Testing Null and Undefined Edge Cases should handle undefined as email
testcase.classname: should handle undefined as email

testcase.name: Edge Cases and Boundary Testing Null and Undefined Edge Cases should handle NaN as email
testcase.classname: should handle NaN as email

testcase.name: Edge Cases and Boundary Testing Null and Undefined Edge Cases should handle empty object as email
testcase.classname: should handle empty object as email

testcase.name: Edge Cases and Boundary Testing Null and Undefined Edge Cases should handle primitive conversion appropriately
testcase.classname: should handle primitive conversion appropriately

testcase.name: Validation Functions - Unit Tests Email Validation should accept valid email format: user@example.com
testcase.classname: should accept valid email format: user@example.com

testcase.name: Validation Functions - Unit Tests Email Validation should accept valid email format: test.user@domain.co.uk
testcase.classname: should accept valid email format: test.user@domain.co.uk

testcase.name: Validation Functions - Unit Tests Email Validation should accept email with plus sign: user+tag@example.com
testcase.classname: should accept email with plus sign: user+tag@example.com

testcase.name: Validation Functions - Unit Tests Email Validation should reject email missing @ symbol
testcase.classname: should reject email missing @ symbol

testcase.name: Validation Functions - Unit Tests Email Validation should reject email missing domain: user@
testcase.classname: should reject email missing domain: user@

testcase.classname: should reject email with missing local part: @example.com

testcase.classname: should reject empty email string

testcase.classname: should reject email with spaces

testcase.classname: should reject short password: 123

testcase.classname: should handle boundary: exactly 6 characters

testcase.classname: should accept username with underscore: user_name

testcase.classname: should reject username with 2 characters: ab

testcase.classname: should reject single character username: a

testcase.classname: should handle empty username string appropriately

testcase.classname: should accept all valid usernames from test data

testcase.classname: should reject short usernames from test data appropriately

testcase.name: Validation Functions - Unit Tests Username Validation should handle boundary: exactly 3 characters
testcase.classname: should handle boundary: exactly 3 characters

testcase.name: Validation Functions - Unit Tests Username Validation should reject 2 character username: boundary
testcase.classname: should reject 2 character username: boundary

testcase.name: Validation Functions - Unit Tests Field Empty Validation should return true for empty string
testcase.classname: should return true for empty string

testcase.name: Validation Functions - Unit Tests Field Empty Validation should return true for whitespace only
testcase.classname: should return true for whitespace only

testcase.name: Validation Functions - Unit Tests Field Empty Validation should return true for null
testcase.classname: should return true for null

testcase.name: Validation Functions - Unit Tests Field Empty Validation should return true for undefined
testcase.classname: should return true for undefined

testcase.name: Validation Functions - Unit Tests Field Empty Validation should return false for valid input
testcase.classname: should return false for valid input

testcase.name: Validation Functions - Unit Tests Field Empty Validation should return false for text with numbers
testcase.classname: should return false for text with numbers

testcase.name: Validation Functions - Unit Tests Combined Validation Scenarios should validate complete signup form with all valid data
testcase.classname: should validate complete signup form with all valid data

testcase.name: Validation Functions - Unit Tests Combined Validation Scenarios should fail form validation if email is invalid
testcase.classname: should fail form validation if email is invalid

testcase.name: Validation Functions - Unit Tests Combined Validation Scenarios should fail form validation if password is too short
testcase.classname: should fail form validation if password is too short

testcase.name: Validation Functions - Unit Tests Combined Validation Scenarios should fail form validation if username is too short
testcase.classname: should fail form validation if username is too short
